zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Mohun於大約1227年出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，他的父親Reginald II de Mohun23歲，母親Hawise FitzGeoffrey21歲。他於1245年之後與Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1253年7月29日在法國加斯可享年27歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特布盧頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Mohun于大约1227年出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，他的父亲Reginald II de Mohun23岁，母亲Hawise FitzGeoffrey21岁。他于1245年之后与Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1253年7月29日在法国加斯可享年27岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特布盧頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Mohun was born about 1227, in Dunster, Somerset, England, his father, Reginald II de Mohun, was 23 and his mother, Hawise FitzGeoffrey, was 21. He married Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' after 1245. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 July 1253, in Gascogne, France, at the age of 27, and was buried in Bruton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Mohun est né environ 1227, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Reginald II de Mohun, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Hawise FitzGeoffrey, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' après 1245. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 juillet 1253, à Gascogne, France, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterré à Bruton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Mohun um 1227 in Dunster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald II de Mohun 23 und seine Mutter Hawise FitzGeoffrey 21. Er hat nach 1245 Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. Juli 1253 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Gascogne, Frankreich und wurde in Bruton, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Mohun è nato il circa 1227 nel Dunster, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Reginald II de Mohun, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Hawise FitzGeoffrey, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' dopo il 1245. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 luglio 1253, nel Gascogne, Francia, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolto a Bruton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Mohunが約1227年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Reginald II de Mohunは23歳，母Hawise FitzGeoffreyは21歳であった。1245年以後にJoan de Ferrers 'the Elder'と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1253年7月29日にフランスガスコグンで27歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトブルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Mohun(이)가 대략 1227년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald II de Mohun(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise FitzGeoffrey(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1245년 이후 Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년 7월 29일 프랑스 가스코그니에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 브루턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Mohun nasceu aproximadamente 1227, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald II de Mohun, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Hawise FitzGeoffrey, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' após 1245. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de julho de 1253, em Gascogne, França, com 27 anos, e foi sepultado em Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Mohun родился около 1227 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Reginald II de Mohun было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise FitzGeoffrey, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' после 1245 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 июля 1253 г. в местности гаскогн, Франция в возрасте 27 лет и был похоронен в местности брутон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Mohun nació aproximadamente 1227, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald II de Mohun, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Hawise FitzGeoffrey, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' después de 1245. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de julio de 1253, en Gascogne, Francia, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultado en Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
